Home › Orange County › Orlando › MEDITERANEAN DELI
A 100

MEDITERANEAN DELI

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: May 22, 2026

MEDITERANEAN DELI is a Mediterranean restaurant at 981 W FAIRBANKS AVE in Orlando, Orange County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on May 22, 2026, it received a grade of A with a score of 100 out of 100. Inspectors recorded no outstanding violations. By health score, it is safer than 100% of Orange County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.9 stars across 1625 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $10–20 range. Menu options are noted as suitable for vegan, vegetarian, dairy-free, and healthy diners.

Inspections trending: improving · last inspected 36 days ago

Get directions Call (407) 539-2650

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. May 22, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 0 basic

    No violations cited.

  2. February 6, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 1 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean

  3. September 12, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 1 basic

    • 11 — Employee health knowledge; no ill/symptomatic employee present
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training
